message:
chore(audit): record batches 407-409 (HTTP/DB/channel/sync deep audit)

circuit_breaker.rs (2 FIXED), plus cancel/obligation subsystems (5 SOUND)

Batch 408: decoding.rs (1 FIXED), grpc/client.rs (1 FIXED), messaging
{morphism,policy,privacy,federation} (4 SOUND), channels/sync (5 SOUND)

sqlite.rs (6 SOUND)

Total session: ~95K lines audited, 18 bugs fixed across 40+ files.
